SubNum.Description: The unique identification number assigned to each participants

Ver.Description: Indicates the specific stimulus set version assigned to the participant. To ensure balanced data collection, 40 videos were divided into 10 versions (Ver1-10), each containing 4 clips - one from each emotional category.

Age.Description: The age of the participant at the time of the survey

A_SAM_Val.Description: Self-assessment of valence during the practice phase (A1-A3) using image stimuli. Rated on a 9-point scale from -4(Very Negative) to 4(Very Positive), where 0 represents Neutral.

A_SAM_Aro.Description: Self-assessment of arousal during the practice phase (A1-A3). Rated on a 9-point scale from 1 (calm) to 9 (excited).

A_PrE.Description: Binary Response (0: Not selected, 1: Selected) for 16 discrete emotional adjectives via PrEmo during the practice phase. Adjectives follow the order: Joy, Hope, Pride, Admiration, Fascination, Desire, Satisfaction, Relaxation, Sadness, Fear, Shame, Contempt, Anger, Boredom, Disgust, and None of these.

B_SAM_Val.Description: Self-assessment of valence for the 4 assigned video clips (B1-B4). Rate on a 9-point bipolar scale from -4 (Very Negative) to 4 (Very Positive), with 0 as a Neutral.

B_SAM_Aro.Description: Self-assessment of arousal for the 4 video clips (B1-B4), ranging from 1 (calm) to 9 (excited).

B_PrE.Description: Binary responses for 16 PrEmo emotional adjectives for each video (B1-B4). The order of adjectives is identical to Part A.

B_High.Description: Selection of emotional highlights from 6 chronological screenshots per video, plus a 'None of these' option. Results are recorded as binary values (0 or 1) across total 7 options, allowing for multiple selections per trial.
